{{Infobox artifact
| name = emerald (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|An emerald rose from the center of the flames and acted as a guide.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c1">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The emerald is described as shining like a star and hovering in the air.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The emerald is hot enough to feel like it would burn [[Jyrine]] through her skirt.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
